narrative:
Westerville 3-E (precinct in Franklin County) has 789 registered voters, with 56.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.9%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.3 percentage points.
